news.headline: Four killed in protests during Kenyan strikes over high fuel prices
news.summary: Thousands of commuters are stranded, with key roads in the capital Nairobi largely empty due to the protests over fuel costs.

news.headline: Belarus holds drills with Russian nuclear weapons, drawing criticism from Ukraine
news.summary:
Belarus said on Monday its armed forces had begun training exercises involving Russian nuclear weapons, in a move that drew strong condemnation from Ukraine.
